case_title: FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS WILLIAMS, TYRONE L.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TYRONE L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TYRONE L.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TYRONE L. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,570.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
